user_intent_summary: Identify routes with unusually high or low anomaly-related events for monitoring.

datasets.name: allarmi_raw
datasets.rationale: Dataset contains alarm occurrences and route endpoints. Grouping by departure and arrival airports yields route-level aggregates for anomaly detection on alarm counts.

datasets.name: tipologia_raw
datasets.rationale: Dataset includes control outcomes and route endpoints. Grouping by airports captures route-level anomaly metrics for flagged travelers.
